personality_one_liner: A calm, text-first daily journal for your vocabulary, focusing on beautiful typography, generous breathing room, and reflective learning over gamification.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Use whitespace and typography for layout hierarchy instead of cards and shadows.

dont's: Skip glass entirely as the Editorial personality relies on solid paper surfaces, borders, and whitespace for hierarchy.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Onboard users into the calm, reflective learning space with a serene background.
screens.layout: Hero image (reading aesthetic) at the top with a top-to-bottom vertical gradient scrim (transparent to >=70% surfaceInverse). Clean inputs below, and a single solid primary CTA sticky at the bottom.

screens.name: Today's Word (Home)
screens.purpose: Introduce the single daily word, its phonetic spelling, meaning, and an example sentence.
screens.layout: Editorial full-width structure. Large display serif title at the top, phonetic spelling, audio playback icon. Content block for definition and italicized example sentence. A prominent 'Practice' primary CTA sticky at the bottom.

screens.name: Practice & Feedback
screens.purpose: User enters 3 sentences using the word and receives AI scoring/feedback.
screens.layout: Focus mode. Word context at the top (smaller). 3 text input fields stacked with generous padding. Form labels above inputs. 'Submit for Feedback' sticky CTA at the bottom inside KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Word Library
screens.purpose: Browse previously unlocked words and view the current learning streak.

states.empty: Calm illustration stating no words unlocked yet.

screens.layout: Header section features the grand library image backdrop with a gradient scrim and streak metrics overlaid in onSurfaceInverse text. Below, a minimal edge-to-edge list of unlocked words using hairline dividers.

screens.name: Revision Flow
screens.purpose: Set up and execute the revision session, grading meaning and sentence inputs.
screens.layout: Stepped/paged screens for each word being revised. Minimal text, single input focused. Upon finishing all words, a full-screen summary score card appears with feedback and a 'Finish' CTA.

auth_hero.alt: Woman enjoying a peaceful reading moment in a sunlit bedroom, cozy atmosphere.

library_header.alt: A grand library interior with tall bookshelves, skylights, and people studying.

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICTLY use 'Cormorant Garamond' (display serif) and 'Geist' (sans-serif text). Cap font weights at 500 max. Do NOT use 600, 700, or bold variants.
Follow the Editorial LIGHT personality. Do NOT use any glassmorphism, blur, or heavy shadows. Use whitespace and 0.5pt hairline borders (#E7E5DF) for separation.

Place a gradient-to-dark scrim over any background images (auth_hero, library_header) to ensure text readability (Layer 0: image, Layer 1: linear gradient 0% transparent to 70%+ surfaceInverse, Layer 2: text using onSurfaceInverse).
Ensure 'Submit Sentences' flow uses sticky CTA buttons anchored above the keyboard within a KeyboardAvoidingView.
Maintain the strict ban on blues, purples, and indigos. Use the defined Ochre brand color (#A16207) for emphasis and active states.
Do NOT gamify the experience with badges, confetti, or loud colors. Keep the tone reflective and journal-like.
Use Feather icons consistently with a single stroke weight. Avoid mixing icon sets.
